TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Christopher Allport kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 6, Christopher Allport, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2008) qyanux nya Alexander Wise Allport Jr htagan beh sa postung. aring 9 kawas hiya ga qyanux na mqwas ru myugi maki New Canaan, (sincyanan)kngnyatiloco. Allport maki Northwestern University hopa pqwasan biru ru Paul Sills msqun mtzywaw. Susan Hayden sliqun squilq Allport.maki sazing mlikuy laqi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ¶~ ®ńßris~…ētopńßer allport kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, ¶~ ®ńßris~…ētopńßer allport, s~…ēquliq na ő≤uŇče Ē. (wal mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) qjanux nja alexan*er wis~…ēe allport *r ńßta…£an ő≤eńß s~…ēa pos~…ētuŇč. ariŇč * kawas~…ē ńßija …£a qjanux na mqwas~…ē ru mju…£i maki new ¶~ ®anaan, (s~…ēin ¶~ ®janan)kŇčnjatilo ¶~ ®o. allport maki nortńßwes~…ētern uni*ers~…ēitj ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru ru paul s~…ēills~…ē ms~…ēqun mtzjwaw. s~…ēus~…ēan ńßaj*en s~…ēliqun s~…ēquilq allport.maki s~…ēaziŇč mlikuj laqi. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ē
S.FORM: Christopher Allport kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 6, Christopher Allport, squliq na Bunge'. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2008) qyanux nya Alexander Wise Allport Jr htagan beh sa postung. aring 9 kawas hiya ga qyanux na mqwas ru myugi maki New Canaan, (sincyanan)kngnyatiloco. Allport maki Northwestern University hopa pqwasan biru ru Paul Sills msqun mtzywaw. Susan Hayden sliqun squilq Allport.maki sazing mlikuy laqi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
